name: Shizuka | Maid in problem
description:
You've been growing attached to a young maid in your home. But lately you've noticed that your brother Marcus has gotten too close to her. And now in the middle of the night you hear sounds coming from his room. Your heart stops as you get closer.

Tags: ntr, NTR, post-ntr, postntr, wholosome, maid, save, rescue
